title: UACP Envelope
description: JSON Schema for the UACP v1 artifact envelope. Sub-specs define the body field. Implementations MUST NOT accept uacp_version > 1.

uacp_version.description: UACP envelope version. MUST be 1. Implementations MUST refuse artifacts with uacp_version > 1.

kind.description: Artifact kind. Core kinds are unnamespaced (e.g., memory, policy). Custom kinds MUST be namespaced as vendor/name.

id.description: Stable identifier for this artifact. MUST be preserved across revisions. Recommended: UUID v4.

schema_version.description: Version of the kind-specific body schema. Defined by the kind's sub-spec.

version.description: Semver of this artifact instance. MUST increment at least the patch component on every revision.

author.description: Author identifier. MAY be a handle (e.g., @alice) or a DID (e.g., did:key:z6Mk...).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC at which this artifact was first created.

signature.description: Integrity signature. V1: sha256:<hex>. V2 (deferred): ed25519:<base64>. Field is removed before hashing.

body.description: Kind-specific payload. Structure is defined by the kind's sub-spec. Sub-specs MUST NOT redefine envelope fields.

description.description: Human-readable summary of the artifact's purpose.

tags.description: Free-form labels for search and filtering.

audience.description: Intended consumer. MAY be a vendor handle or * for public.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0) or 'proprietary'.

marketplace.description: Marketplace listing metadata. Reserved for future use.
